response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio lyrics matched the reference JSON perfectly. 2. JSON Usage: The lyrics provided in the reference JSON for '恥ずかしいか青春は' were used to verify spelling and translation details. The first song '夢色フェスティバル' was manually transcribed and translated using the on-screen lyrics and native audio. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps were accurately synced to the start and end of vocal ranges. Aggressive truncation was used in fast transition phrases to prevent cascading delay.

subtitles.english: Just like that...

subtitles.original: 夢のビートきざもうよ
subtitles.english: Let's keep the beat of our dreams going!
Make some noise!
Bloom in full glory!

subtitles.original: だから22日のフェスティバル
subtitles.english: So here is our 22nd festival!

subtitles.original: 常熱リズムでノリノリたいよ
subtitles.english: I want to groove with this passionate rhythm!

subtitles.original: 笑顔満開 → 無限大 It's Alright!
subtitles.english: Smiling faces in full bloom to infinity, It's Alright!

subtitles.original: ひいふうみいて 編み上げて
subtitles.english: One, two, three, let's braid it up!

subtitles.original: 君色教えて 気になっちゃう color
subtitles.english: Tell me your color, I'm curious about it!

subtitles.original: そんな感じで！ 夢のビート聴かせてよ
subtitles.english: Just like that! Let me hear the beat of your dreams!
So we won't ever stop!
Ha! Ha!
Soiya! Soiya!
Ha- dokkoi!

subtitles.original: どっこいしょ！ どっこいしょ！
subtitles.english: Dokkoisho! Dokkoisho!
Is youth embarrassing?
From the place where it was bruised...

subtitles.original: 熟れていく果実のように
subtitles.english: ...ripening like a fruit.

subtitles.original: 僕らは些細なことでへこたれたよな
subtitles.english: We got discouraged by trivial things, didn't we?
Without ever becoming a scab...

subtitles.original: 息せき切ってがむしゃらに
subtitles.english: Breathing hard and recklessly,

subtitles.original: 輝く一等星をめがけて
subtitles.english: aiming for the shining first-magnitude star,
we reached out our hands, didn't we?
Delicate, yet bold,

subtitles.original: うるさい これが切り札だ
subtitles.english: Shut up, this is our trump card!
A crybaby, yet hot-blooded,

subtitles.original: うるさい これが持ち味だ
subtitles.english: Shut up, this is our specialty!
An unexplored adventure zone,
an era of thriving curiosity!
We know what is beautiful,
we have an eye for it!
Is youth embarrassing?
Is being serious ridiculous?

subtitles.original: 僕ら全力でやってんだ
subtitles.english: We are doing our absolute best!
Brandish your existence!
Stir up your heart!

subtitles.original: あとどれくらい続いていくだろう
subtitles.english: How much longer will this continue?
The youth we protected to the end...
...is the greatest luxury of all!

subtitles.original: きっといつか焦がれ思い返す
subtitles.english: Surely someday we will yearn for it and look back,
on this relationship with no name,
on these feelings we can't throw away.

subtitles.original: 何気ない今日を忘れないでね
subtitles.english: Please don't forget this casual today.
The color of the seed I worried over...

subtitles.original: 昨日とはまるで違うとか
subtitles.english: ...is completely different from yesterday,

subtitles.original: そんなの日常茶飯事で
subtitles.english: things like that happen every single day,
yet our hearts seem to be honest.
Whether we are comrades-in-arms or best friends,

subtitles.original: うるさい どれも正解だ
subtitles.english: Shut up, any of those is correct!
Whether it's first love or a broken heart,

subtitles.original: うるさい どれも宝石だ
subtitles.english: Shut up, each one of them is a gem!
